channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: tnd_patches
item.description: A set of patches for The New Dawn server

item.title: Universal barrel liquid fix
item.description: Just dll for CZ4 Tabor server barrels

item.title: Optimum
item.description: High-performance client fork. Compile-time patches, no Harmony. Same gameplay, faster frames

item.title: Fast Mushroom Harvesting
item.description: You don't need tools to pick mushrooms, it's easy and quick to pick them by hand - now with sound!

item.title: Rudiments
item.description: Pre-industrial craft, done properly. Fibre, clay, kilns, stone tools, mud — one step at a time.

item.title: Ecosystem - Flora
item.description: Making flora living

item.title: Enter Notification Sound
item.description: Just a notification sound when you join the world.

item.title: Easy Alcohol Distilling Fork
item.description: Easy Alcohol Distilling

item.title: xSkills Gilded Fork
item.description: This mod adds a beautifully designed, immersive, and user-friendly interface for xSkills.

item.title: Vintage Reborn Server Tweaks
item.description: i wouldnt use unless you are join Vintage Reborn!

item.title: Catch and Release: Fish
item.description: Catch fish live and place them in various sized aquariums.

item.title: lhgui
item.description: GUI mod for lasthearth server

item.title: MagicServerTweaks
item.description: Tweaks for my magic server

item.title: Slings Progression
item.description: Adds new slingshots that can be obtained by progressing through the game.

item.title: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack
item.description: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack（复古物语模组汉化包）

item.title: Extinguish unequipped torches
item.description: Extinguishes torches in your inventory that are not in your main or offhand

item.title: C&N RPG Classes
item.description: RPG classes for Vintage Story

item.title: Rental Permission
item.description: Adds paid rentals for reinforced or locked blocks inside configured land claims.

item.title: C&N Effects
item.description: Adds different potion effects and HUD for tracking their time and tier

item.title: Instant Fruit Press
item.description: Instant juice extraction

item.title: Downed
item.description: Replaces the vanilla downed state with a survivable, invulnerable downed state. Quite bloody.

item.title: BetterEr Prospecting
item.description: Altered prospecting experience with focus on reducing randomness

item.title: Secret Foxfire 1.22 Tweaks
item.description: Tweaks for my community 1.22 server.

item.title: Mycenaean House (WorldEdit Schematic)
item.description: A WorldEdit schematic of a Greek Bronze Age house.

item.title: Simple water tweaks
item.description: This mod modifies the game's water by adding an alternative wave effect and a more vibrant color

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Cannibalism
item.description: Ever wanted to eat your friends? Now you can. Seraph spawn a corpse on death that can be harvested.

item.title: Rift Beasts Belong Underground FORKED
item.description: Fork of riftbeastsbelongunderground.

item.title: Rendered Fat Candles
item.description: Allows creation of candles from Resin/Beeswax, Peat, Rope, and Rendered Fat!

item.title: Pico TrashSlot
item.description: A seamless trash slot that docks to your inventory for quickly deleting unwanted items.
